description.value: Aura faint divination; CL 5th; Slot ring; Price 3,000 gp; Weight – DESCRIPTION A slender copper band, a tyrantâs friend is thin enough to be hidden beneath another ring (although it still counts against the limit of magic rings a character can wear). The ring grows noticeably warmer whenever the hand wearing it touches a poisoned or poisonous object or creature (including containers holding poison), warning the wearer of potential danger. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Forge Ring; Spells detect poison; Cost 1,500 gp
